title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
